**Status:** Draft
**Date:** YYYY-MM-DD
**Scope:** <!-- nexus-workflow-core | nexus-workflow-app | nexus-erp | cross-cutting -->

---

## Problem Statement

<!-- What is broken, missing, or painful today? Why does this need to change? -->

---

## Goals

- <!-- What must be true when this is done? -->

---

## Non-Goals

- <!-- What is explicitly out of scope for this spec? -->

---

## Users

<!-- Who is affected by this change? Developers, end users, downstream systems? -->

---

## Requirements

<!-- Break down into sub-sections as needed (e.g. API, UI, DB, Non-Functional). -->

---

## Decisions

| Question | Decision |
|---|---|
| | |

---

## Success Metrics

- <!-- How will we know this is done and working correctly? -->

---

## Out of Scope

- <!-- Restate the most important non-goals for clarity. -->
